name: ios-simulator-skill
desc: An IOS Simulator Skill for ClaudeCode. Use it to optimise Claude's ability to build, run and interact with your apps. I mainly use it as an xcodebuild wrapper …
descFull: An IOS Simulator Skill for ClaudeCode. Use it to optimise Claude's ability to build, run and interact with your apps. I mainly use it as an xcodebuild wrapper to save context.
